headlines.title: Jordan, European Commission chief welcome Israel-Lebanon deal
headlines.snippet: Jordan, European Commission chief welcome Israel-Lebanon deal European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said on Saturday that she welcomes the Israel-Lebanon framework agreement signed in Washington as a “critical step” towards peace in the region.

headlines.title: Israel attack on Gaza refugee camp kills two, including a young girl
